core_mechanism: Poisson generalized linear regression of a non-negative count response on multiple explanatory covariates via a log link, combined with rarefaction/subsampling to correct the counts for uneven sampling effort before inferring which covariates most strongly drive the count
brief_reason: The abstract states drivers of species richness (a count) are examined with Poisson Generalized Linear Models on many environmental covariates, using effort-corrected rarefied richness and spatial thinning to control sampling bias.
